23: S'pose an adventurer like you mightn't've noticed, always comin' an' goin' as ye are, but stick around in the city fer a while an' you'll see─the 'jackets ain't just axes fer 'ire, they're true friends o' the common folk.

26: But she never forgot the fireworks. The amount o' gunpowder that went through 'er 'ands over the years, she couldn't 'elp learnin' a bit about makin' things go bang. A prenticeship with the cannoneers later, and she was a Yellowjacket.

44: ...Is that so? I should have known it. It is very much like you to help others fulfil their dreams. To bring life and light to the world.
